checklist.title: Pre-Duty Safety Checklist
checklist.subTitle1: Perform a quick and thorough check to ensure the vehicle is roadworthy.
checklist.subTitle2: These items are essential for protecting Protected Health Information (PHI) and maintaining liability coverage.
checklist.q1: Are the headlights, tail lights, turn signals, and brake lights working properly?
checklist.q2: Are the tires properly inflated with no visible damage or excessive wear?
checklist.q3: Are all mirrors properly adjusted and the windshield clean and free of obstructions?
checklist.q4: Confirm that the vehicle will remain locked whenever PHI is present.
checklist.q5: Are all medical packages and PHI containers stored in a secure, non-visible area (e.g., the trunk)?
checklist.q6: Are you carrying your ID badge?
checklist.q7: Is a medical-grade biohazard spill kit present in the vehicle and easily accessible?
checklist.q8: Are the insulated transport containers clean and the temperature-monitoring devices (if required) functioning properly?
checklist.q9: Are disposable gloves, masks, and hand sanitizer available in the vehicle?
checklist.q10: Are extra leakproof bags and absorbent materials available for emergency repacking?
